use_cases: Interactive button with animated dot indicator for hover states in web applications
Call-to-action trigger with visual feedback for SaaS landing pages
Navigation button with animated arrow-dots effect for modern interfaces
Animated UI element for interactive cards and pricing sections
Decorative button with dot matrix animation effect for creative tools
ai_summary: An animated button component featuring a dot matrix pattern that creates a sequential wave-like animation effect on hover. The button displays 'Arrow-Dots' text with an accompanying icon containing five vertically arranged dots that animate based on index values. Built with React and CSS custom properties for flexible animation control and responsive design.
